offer: For Shopify store owners processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual data entry causes late orders. We automate data formatting instead of manual data entry into CRM systems.
problem: Inability to efficiently format customer data for CRM systems
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Shopify store owners
Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflows
DM outreach to Shopify store owners with demo video
Community forums where Shopify store owners share tools
try_it: Let users try data formatting templates on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showing manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing customer data
Provide one-click export for simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
